title: hieracium murorum subsp. punctillum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. punctillum, also known as punctate hawkweed or wall hawkweed, is a subspecies of the Hieracium murorum plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. punctillum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and act as an antiseptic, making it a potential treatment for minor cuts and scrapes. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol to release its medicinal properties.
